MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF/CLAIMANT TAYLOR SMITH's MOTION TO VACATE OR SET ASIDE THE VOIDING OF THE FILING OF THE COMPLAINT

Plaintiff Taylor Smith's motion to set aside dismissal is granted. The dismissal filed April 5, 2017 is vacated and the first amended complaint becomes the operative complaint. The case shall be restored to the civil active list. Plaintiff is entitled to set aside the April 5, 2017 dismissal per the mandatory relief provisions of CCP 473(b). Even if those provisions were inapplicable, the court exercises its discretion to set aside the April 5, 2017 dismissal based on a sufficient showing of mistake and excusable neglect. Order signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian , CSR No:12355 , email: lgillian@sftc.org. (D302)
